property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showSplInfo
property.label: Show Study Plan Panel
property.description: Show Study plan record info panel.

property.name: splInfoFields
property.label: Study Plan Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: splInfoColumnNo
property.label: Study Plan Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: showSpsGroupInfo
property.label: Show Study Plan Structure Group Panel
property.description: Show Study plan structure group record info panel.

property.name: spsGroupTitleField
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Title Field
property.description: The Study Plan Structure field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: spsGroupInfoFields
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: spsGroupInfoColumnNo
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Group Accordion Background Color
property.description: The Study plan structure group accordion backgound color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Group Accordion Text Color
property.description: The Study plan structure group accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: spsUnitTableFields
property.label: Study Plan Structure Unit Table Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the unit tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Enable Clickable Ref Field
property.description: Enable reference e.g., Lookup and Master Detail field as clicklable in the datatable.

property.name: hrefTargetType
property.label: Url/Reference Field Target Type
property.description: The target attributes specifies whether to open the url/reference field in the same window or a new window.

property.name: groupFieldSetName
property.label: Group Field Set API Name
property.description: Study Plan Structure field set API name for new/edit group.

property.name: unitFieldSetName
property.label: Unit Field Set API Name
property.description: Study Plan Structure field set API name for new/edit unit.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: forCommunity
property.label: (Obsolete) For Community?
property.description: Check this if the component is used in Community page.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showSplInfo
property.label: Show Study Plan Panel
property.description: Show Study plan record info panel.

property.name: splInfoFields
property.label: Study Plan Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: splInfoColumnNo
property.label: Study Plan Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: showSpsGroupInfo
property.label: Show Study Plan Structure Group Panel
property.description: Show Study plan structure group record info panel.

property.name: spsGroupTitleField
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Title Field
property.description: The Study Plan Structure field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: spsGroupInfoFields
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: spsGroupInfoColumnNo
property.label: Study Plan Structure Group Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Group Accordion Background Color
property.description: The Study plan structure group accordion backgound color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Group Accordion Text Color
property.description: The Study plan structure group accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: spsUnitTableFields
property.label: Study Plan Structure Unit Table Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the unit tables in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: enableClickableRefField
property.label: Enable Clickable Ref Field
property.description: Enable reference e.g., Lookup and Master Detail field as clicklable in the datatable.

property.name: hrefTargetType
property.label: Url/Reference Field Target Type
property.description: The target attributes specifies whether to open the url/reference field in the same window or a new window.

property.name: groupFieldSetName
property.label: Group Field Set API Name
property.description: Study Plan Structure field set API name for new/edit group.

property.name: unitFieldSetName
property.label: Unit Field Set API Name
property.description: Study Plan Structure field set API name for new/edit unit.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: forCommunity
property.label: (Obsolete) For Community?
property.description: Check this if the component is used in Community page.
